examples: According to Valerie Gauthier, associate dean at HEC Paris, the key lies in the process by which MBA programmes recruit their students.
Mr Wilson's wife, Valerie Plame, was a covert CIA operative.
Valerie Diker, a breeder and owner, poses one of her dachshunds to promote dog food.
Valerie Jarrett is an adviser who has been close to the Obamas for years.
Valerie Wade, owner of a London interiors shop, remembers such a froufrou style from her childhood.
